arts.ttl: Referee removed from duty as connections to clubs including Manchester City and Aston Villa investigated
arts.sum: Fans of the Premier League often wrongly insist that the officiating in the league is much worse than elsewhere in Europe. Indeed, the drama seen in Spanish football on a relatively frequent basis is much more than happens even with media related to the English top flight. arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Manchester City, 2025 Champions League: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Manchester City in the return leg of the Champions League ’s Round of 32. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Valverde, Rudiger, Asencio, Mendy, Tchouameni, Ceballos, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Preview: Can Man City come from behind to beat Real Madrid?
arts.sum: Football writer Ben Bloom analyses the key details as Manchester City travel to Real Madrid for the second leg of their UEFA Champions League playoff tie. For the fourth successive season, either Manchester City or Real Madrid will end the other’s UEFA Champions League campaign when the two sides meet on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid desperate to avoid unwanted Champions League first against Manchester City
arts.sum: It would be the first time in 33 years since the Champions League was rebranded, ahead of the 1992/23 season, that Madrid have qualified for the tournament and not reached the round of 16 . As the most successful club in the history of the Champions League, Real Madrid would not have anticipated failing to qualify directly for the round of 16 of the ‘new’ UCL.
